mermaidSyntax:
classDiagram
    class EthicalPrinciple {
        +name: String
        +description: String
        +evaluate()
        +report_violation()
    }
    
    class Beneficence {
        +risk_benefit_ratio: Float
        +assess_harm()
        +assess_benefit()
    }
    
    class NonMaleficence {
        +harm_threshold: Float
        +identify_risks()
    }
    
    class Autonomy {
        +consent_type: String
        +verify_informed_consent()
        +assess_capacity()
    }
    
    class Justice {
        +selection_criteria: List
        +evaluate_fair_selection()
        +assess_burden_distribution()
    }
    
    class IRBReview {
        +protocol_id: String
        +review_type: String
        +committee_members: List
        +full_board_review()
        +expedited_review()
        +exempt_determination()
    }
    
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- Beneficence
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- NonMaleficence
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- Autonomy
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- Justice
    
    IRBReview --> Beneficence : uses
    IRBReview --> NonMaleficence : uses
    IRBReview --> Autonomy : uses
    IRBReview --> Justice : uses
